title: ECNU — Nov 20 2024 (oral-exam fragment)
html:
1:47 voice memo from east china normal university Putuo Campus, Nov 20 2024 — transcript reduced to "Question 1. Question 4." Whisper failed to capture the Mandarin body. Almost certainly oral-exam practice in the same series as 2024 09 23 east china normal university putuo campus zaoyang road 788 haomen 2; preserved as a shanghai study abroad node, candidate for re-transcription.

east china normal university · shanghai study abroad · china chapter · shanghai · mandarin 3
